interfaces.name: Tank
interfaces.signature: @Model final class Tank { var id: UUID; var name: String; var netSystemVolume: Double; var volumeUnit: VolumeUnit; var createdAt: Date }
interfaces.notes: Main-actor model; UUID uniqueness enforced in repository layer.

interfaces.name: WaterTest
interfaces.signature: @Model final class WaterTest { var id: UUID; var tank: Tank?; var parameter: WaterParameter; var value: Double; var alkUnit: AlkUnit?; var timestamp: Date }
interfaces.notes: Raw reading; immutable-ish by convention after save.

interfaces.name: DosingProduct
interfaces.signature: @Model final class DosingProduct { var id: UUID; var name: String; var parameter: WaterParameter; var concentration: Double; var concentrationUnitLabel: String; var isSeedDefault: Bool }
interfaces.notes: Editable in recommendation flow; captured in DoseTrace.

interfaces.name: DoseRecommendationSnapshot
interfaces.signature: @Model final class DoseRecommendationSnapshot { var id: UUID; var tankId: UUID; var testId: UUID; var encodedTrace: Data; var createdAt: Date }
interfaces.notes: Persisted immutable recommendation artifact; never recomputed when shown.

interfaces.name: AppliedDose
interfaces.signature: @Model final class AppliedDose { var id: UUID; var tankId: UUID; var parameter: WaterParameter; var recommendationSnapshotId: UUID?; var amount: Double; var productId: UUID; var timestamp: Date; var note: String? }
interfaces.notes: Explicit user action log; drives same-day suppression.

interfaces.name: LivestockSpecies
interfaces.signature: @Model final class LivestockSpecies { var id: UUID; var name: String; var bioloadPoints: Double; var aggressionTier: Int; var allelopathyTier: Int; var isSeed: Bool }
interfaces.notes: Core roster and compatibility graph vertex data.

interfaces.name: TankRosterEntry
interfaces.signature: @Model final class TankRosterEntry { var id: UUID; var tank: Tank?; var species: LivestockSpecies?; var dateAdded: Date }
interfaces.notes: Current tank occupants for live compatibility checks.

interfaces.name: CompatibilityRuleEdge
interfaces.signature: @Model final class CompatibilityRuleEdge { var id: UUID; var speciesAId: UUID; var speciesBId: UUID; var mechanism: CompatibilityMechanism; var severityDetail: String }
interfaces.notes: Seed/seeded pairwise graph edge with mechanism rationale.

interfaces.name: CompatibilityDecision
interfaces.signature: @Model final class CompatibilityDecision { var id: UUID; var tankId: UUID; var candidateSpeciesName: String; var rosterNamesSnapshot: [String]; var riskTier: RiskTier; var mechanismSummaries: [String]; var timestamp: Date }
interfaces.notes: Audit record captured only on explicit add action.

interfaces.name: ReminderPreference
interfaces.signature: @Model final class ReminderPreference { var id: UUID; var tankId: UUID; var isEnabled: Bool; var cadenceDays: Int; var scheduledNotificationId: String? }
interfaces.notes: Local reminder settings; no hard dependency on notification grant.

interfaces.name: WaterParameter
interfaces.signature: enum WaterParameter: String, Codable, CaseIterable { case calcium, magnesium, alkalinity, nitrate, phosphate }
interfaces.notes: Canonical parameter identity used across tests, solver, UI status, and charts.

interfaces.name: AlkUnit
interfaces.signature: enum AlkUnit: String, Codable { case dKH, meqPerL, ppmCaCO3 }
interfaces.notes: Explicit alkalinity units for user entry and solver conversion.

interfaces.name: VolumeUnit
interfaces.signature: enum VolumeUnit: String, Codable { case gallons, liters }
interfaces.notes: Tank volume unit with deterministic conversion helpers in domain.

interfaces.name: DoseTrace
interfaces.signature: struct DoseTrace: Codable, Equatable, Sendable, Identifiable { let id: UUID; let parameter: WaterParameter; let currentValue: Double; let targetValue: Double; let delta: Double; let alkUnit: AlkUnit?; let productName: String; let productConcentration: Double; let netSystemVolume: Double; let volumeUnit: VolumeUnit; let computedDoseAmount: Double; let doseUnitLabel: String; let capApplied: Bool; let capReason: String?; let advisories: [AdvisoryItem]; let computedAt: Date }
interfaces.notes: Frozen immutable recommendation payload persisted to snapshot.

interfaces.name: AdvisoryItem
interfaces.signature: enum AdvisoryItem: Codable, Equatable, Sendable { case capApplied(reason: String); case alreadyAppliedToday(amount: Double, unitLabel: String); case multiParameterStagger(parameters: [WaterParameter]); case notModeled(parameter: WaterParameter) }
interfaces.notes: Maps to recommendation advisory rows.

interfaces.name: DoseComputationResult
interfaces.signature: enum DoseComputationResult: Equatable, Sendable { case trace(DoseTrace); case notModeled(parameter: WaterParameter) }
interfaces.notes: Explicitly handles unsupported NO3/PO4 dosing path.

interfaces.name: DosingSolver
interfaces.signature: enum DosingSolver { static func computeRecommendation(input: DoseValidationInput, dosesAppliedToday: [AppliedDose], otherParametersFlaggedToday: [WaterParameter]) throws -> DoseComputationResult }
interfaces.notes: Pure deterministic engine with same-day reconciliation and conservative caps.

interfaces.name: SpeciesInput
interfaces.signature: struct SpeciesInput: Equatable, Sendable { let id: UUID; let name: String; let bioloadPoints: Double; let aggressionTier: Int; let allelopathyTier: Int }
interfaces.notes: Pure compatibility evaluation input derived from roster/species models.

interfaces.name: CompatibilityMechanism
interfaces.signature: enum CompatibilityMechanism: String, Codable { case aggression, allelopathy, bioload }
interfaces.notes: Named mechanism rows in compatibility reasoning.

interfaces.name: RiskTier
interfaces.signature: enum RiskTier: String, Codable { case clean, caution, highRisk }
interfaces.notes: Compatibility output classification used by UI and decision copy.

interfaces.name: MechanismFinding
interfaces.signature: struct MechanismFinding: Codable, Equatable, Sendable { let mechanism: CompatibilityMechanism; let triggered: Bool; let detail: String; let involvedSpeciesNames: [String] }
interfaces.notes: Named mechanism evidence for explainability and audit.

interfaces.name: CompatibilityResult
interfaces.signature: struct CompatibilityResult: Codable, Equatable, Sendable { let riskTier: RiskTier; let mechanismFindings: [MechanismFinding] }
interfaces.notes: Live compatibility result used by UI; persisted separately by decision write.

interfaces.name: CompatibilityEngine
interfaces.signature: enum CompatibilityEngine { static func evaluate(candidate: SpeciesInput, currentRoster: [SpeciesInput], pairwiseRules: [CompatibilityRuleEdge], tankVolume: Double, volumeUnit: VolumeUnit) -> CompatibilityResult }
interfaces.notes: Pure evaluator: pairwise + additive bioload.

interfaces.name: ParameterStatus
interfaces.signature: enum ParameterStatus { case nominal, flagged, noData; static func evaluate(latestValue: Double?, targetRange: ClosedRange<Double>) -> ParameterStatus }
interfaces.notes: Dashboard-only O(1) status check; must never call DosingSolver.

interfaces.name: ReefDefaults
interfaces.signature: enum ReefDefaults { static func targetRange(for parameter: WaterParameter) -> ClosedRange<Double>; static func seedProduct(for parameter: WaterParameter) -> DosingProduct }
interfaces.notes: Fallback defaults used before user edits target/product.

interfaces.name: DeletePlan
interfaces.signature: struct DeletePlan: Sendable { let dependentWaterTestCount: Int; let dependentDoseSnapshotCount: Int; let dependentAppliedDoseCount: Int; let dependentCompatibilityDecisionCount: Int; let dependentRosterEntryCount: Int }
interfaces.notes: Proactive destructive-delete dependency summary.

interfaces.name: TankRepository
interfaces.signature: @MainActor protocol TankRepository { func createTank(name: String, volume: Double, unit: VolumeUnit) throws -> Tank; func deletePlan(for tank: Tank) -> DeletePlan; func delete(tank: Tank) throws }
interfaces.notes: Plan-first deletion contract; main-actor owned models.

interfaces.name: WaterTestRepository
interfaces.signature: @MainActor protocol WaterTestRepository { func saveTest(tank: Tank, parameter: WaterParameter, value: Double, alkUnit: AlkUnit?, timestamp: Date) throws -> WaterTest; func latestTest(for tank: Tank, parameter: WaterParameter) throws -> WaterTest?; func tests(for tank: Tank, parameter: WaterParameter) throws -> [WaterTest]; func deletePlan(for test: WaterTest) -> DeletePlan; func delete(test: WaterTest) throws }
interfaces.notes: Persistence boundary for all test reads/saves.

interfaces.name: DoseRepository
interfaces.signature: @MainActor protocol DoseRepository { func computeAndPersistRecommendation(test: WaterTest, tank: Tank, product: DosingProduct) throws -> DoseComputationResult; func logAppliedDose(snapshotId: UUID, amount: Double, product: DosingProduct, timestamp: Date, note: String?) throws -> AppliedDose }
interfaces.notes: Command facade for solver execution and applied-dose writes.

interfaces.name: LivestockRepository
interfaces.signature: @MainActor protocol LivestockRepository { func checkCandidate(_ species: LivestockSpecies, in tank: Tank) throws -> CompatibilityResult; func addToRoster(_ species: LivestockSpecies, tank: Tank, decision: CompatibilityResult) throws -> TankRosterEntry }
interfaces.notes: Live check + append-only decision audit capture at add-time.

interfaces.name: ModelContainerManager
interfaces.signature: enum ModelContainerManager { static func makeContainer() -> ContainerOutcome }
interfaces.notes: Failure-safe container creation with recovery path.

interfaces.name: SnapshotService
interfaces.signature: @MainActor final class SnapshotService { static let appGroupID: String; private let writer: SnapshotWriting; init(writer: SnapshotWriting); func updateSnapshot(for tank: Tank, tests: [WaterTest], nextDoseDate: Date?, nextReminderDate: Date?, riskState: WidgetRiskState); func clearSnapshot() }
interfaces.notes: Writes widget DTO only at commit points (test/dose/tank/entitlement change).

interfaces.name: WidgetSnapshot
interfaces.signature: struct WidgetSnapshot: Codable, Sendable { let activeTankId: UUID; let lastTestDate: Date?; let nextDoseDate: Date?; let nextReminderDate: Date?; let widgetRiskState: WidgetRiskState }
interfaces.notes: Absolute dates only; widget computes freshness at render time.

interfaces.name: EntitlementStore
interfaces.signature: protocol EntitlementStore { var isSubscribed: Bool { get } func refresh() async; func canAddTank(currentCount: Int) -> Bool; func compatibilityLibraryLimit() -> Int?; func trendHistoryWindowDays() -> Int? }
interfaces.notes: Feature gates; free/paid policy logic, no live App Store dependency required in v1.

interfaces.name: MockEntitlementStore
interfaces.signature: final class MockEntitlementStore: EntitlementStore { init(isSubscribed: Bool); var isSubscribedOverride: Bool; var isSubscribed: Bool { get }; func refresh() async; func canAddTank(currentCount: Int) -> Bool; func compatibilityLibraryLimit() -> Int?; func trendHistoryWindowDays() -> Int? }
interfaces.notes: Test harness toggling paid state both directions.

interfaces.name: StoreKitEntitlementStore
interfaces.signature: final class StoreKitEntitlementStore: EntitlementStore { init(productIDs: [String]) }
interfaces.notes: Local StoreKit-backed entitlement verifier for simulator testing.

interfaces.name: NotificationScheduler
interfaces.signature: protocol NotificationScheduler: Sendable { func requestAuthorization() async -> Bool; func authorizationStatus() async -> UNAuthorizationStatus; func scheduleTestReminder(tankId: UUID, dueDate: Date); func cancelReminder(tankId: UUID) }
interfaces.notes: Contextual reminder scheduling; denial is non-fatal to core flow.

interfaces.name: NavigationCoordinator
interfaces.signature: @Observable @MainActor final class NavigationCoordinator { var selectedTab: AppTab; var dashboardPath: NavigationPath; var testsPath: NavigationPath; var livestockPath: NavigationPath; var settingsPath: NavigationPath; func jumpToDoseContext(parameter: WaterParameter, tankId: UUID) }
interfaces.notes: Cross-tab navigation control for flagged-card→dose flow.

interfaces.name: AppTab
interfaces.signature: enum AppTab { case dashboard, tests, livestock, settings }
interfaces.notes: Four-tab shell after first tank exists.

interfaces.name: DesignTokens
interfaces.signature: enum DesignTokens { static let background: Color; static let tealSolid: Color; static let tealGlow: Color; static let coralSolid: Color; static let coralGlow: Color; static let violetSolid: Color; static let violetGlow: Color }
interfaces.notes: Two-tier semantic color palette; coral reserved for status only.

interfaces.name: ContrastValidator
interfaces.signature: enum ContrastValidator { static func contrastRatio(foreground: Color, background: Color) -> Double; static func meetsWCAGAA(foreground: Color, background: Color, isLargeText: Bool) -> Bool }
interfaces.notes: Automated token contrast regression.

interfaces.name: ImportExportService
interfaces.signature: protocol ImportExportService { func exportAllData() throws -> Data; func importData(_ data: Data) throws -> ImportSummary }
interfaces.notes: Local JSON safety-net; strict schema enforcement.

interfaces.name: ImportSummary
interfaces.signature: struct ImportSummary { let tanksImported: Int; let testsImported: Int; let dosesImported: Int; let rosterEntriesImported: Int; let warnings: [String] }
interfaces.notes: Expose recoverable import outcomes explicitly.

interfaces.name: AppRootViewModel
interfaces.signature: @MainActor final class AppRootViewModel { var hasTanks: Bool { get }; var loadState: LoadState; var containerOutcome: ContainerOutcome; func bootstrap() async }
interfaces.notes: Implements root gate: setup screen first, then tabs, with recovery branch on container failure.

interfaces.name: LoadState
interfaces.signature: enum LoadState: Equatable { case idle, loading(String?), empty(String), success, error(String) }
interfaces.notes: Uniform UI state machine for all core screens.

interfaces.name: TrendCalculator
interfaces.signature: struct TrendCalculator { func trendSlope(_ points: [WaterTest]) -> Double; func noTrendMessage(_ count: Int) -> String }
interfaces.notes: Pure chart helper, never used in solver control logic.

interfaces.name: ContainerOutcome
interfaces.signature: enum ContainerOutcome { case ready(ModelContainer); case recoveryNeeded(underlying: Error) }
interfaces.notes: Bootstrap contract replacing launch-time force-try.

interfaces.name: HousekeepingTaskScheduler
interfaces.signature: protocol HousekeepingTaskScheduler: Sendable { func register(); func scheduleIfNeeded(); func handleTask(_ task: BGTask) }
interfaces.notes: BGTask as opportunistic precompute only, never correctness source.

interfaces.name: SnapshotWriting
interfaces.signature: protocol SnapshotWriting: Sendable { func write(_ snapshot: WidgetSnapshot) throws; func clear() throws }
interfaces.notes: Abstraction for app-group shared widget storage.

interfaces.name: BrinekeeperApp
interfaces.signature: @main struct BrinekeeperApp: App { let containerOutcome: ContainerOutcome }
interfaces.notes: Bootstrap into recovery or root flow with container outcome.

interfaces.name: RootView
interfaces.signature: struct RootView: View { @Query private var tanks: [Tank] }
interfaces.notes: Root gate: setup when empty, main tabs when seeded.

interfaces.name: WidgetRiskState
interfaces.signature: enum WidgetRiskState: String, Codable, CaseIterable { case ok, warning, blocked }
interfaces.notes: Compact widget aggregate status derived from active tank state.

interfaces.name: RecoveryView
interfaces.signature: struct RecoveryView: View { let error: Error; var onStartFresh: () -> Void; var onExport: () -> Void }
interfaces.notes: Shows export/restart actions after container failure.

interfaces.name: DoseValidationInput
interfaces.signature: struct DoseValidationInput { let parameter: WaterParameter; let currentValue: Double; let currentUnit: AlkUnit?; let targetValue: Double; let tankVolume: Double; let volumeUnit: VolumeUnit; let product: DosingProduct }
interfaces.notes: Normalization point before solver execution.

interfaces.name: DoseComputationError
interfaces.signature: enum DoseComputationError: Error { case invalidValue(String); case missingTarget; case invalidUnits; case unsafeToCompute }
interfaces.notes: Deterministic solver failure surface; each maps to correction messaging.

interfaces.name: SeedCatalogRepository
interfaces.signature: protocol SeedCatalogRepository { func fetchSeedSpecies() throws -> [LivestockSpecies]; func fetchCompatibilityEdges() throws -> [CompatibilityRuleEdge] }
interfaces.notes: Static catalog source for initial seed set.

interfaces.name: ImportExportError
interfaces.signature: enum ImportExportError: Error { case invalidFormat; case unsupportedSchemaVersion; case corruptPayload; case partialFailure(details: [String]) }
interfaces.notes: Typed import/export failure contract.

interfaces.name: AccessibilityAuditService
interfaces.signature: enum AccessibilityAuditService { static func dynamicTypeContrastPasses() -> Bool }
interfaces.notes: Smoke test guardrail for AA contrast at standard and large text.

interfaces.name: TankSetupView
interfaces.signature: struct TankSetupView: View { @Bindable var coordinator: TankSetupCoordinator }
interfaces.notes: Root-gate onboarding; no extra wizard steps.

interfaces.name: DashboardView
interfaces.signature: struct DashboardView: View { var body: some View }
interfaces.notes: Five-parameter cards using ParameterStatus only.

interfaces.name: TestsView
interfaces.signature: struct TestsView: View { var body: some View }
interfaces.notes: Log values and push recommendation destination.

interfaces.name: DoseRecommendationView
interfaces.signature: struct DoseRecommendationView: View { let trace: DoseTrace; let readonly: Bool }
interfaces.notes: Consumes frozen trace and advisory payload only.

interfaces.name: ApplyDoseSheet
interfaces.signature: struct ApplyDoseSheet: View { let prefilledAmount: Double; let snapshotId: UUID }
interfaces.notes: Explicit save action to create AppliedDose.

interfaces.name: LivestockView
interfaces.signature: struct LivestockView: View { var body: some View }
interfaces.notes: Roster and candidate-check flow.

interfaces.name: CompatibilityResultView
interfaces.signature: struct CompatibilityResultView: View { let result: CompatibilityResult }
interfaces.notes: Displays tier and mechanism rows.

interfaces.name: SettingsView
interfaces.signature: struct SettingsView: View { var body: some View }
interfaces.notes: Single sectioned settings for tanks, reminders, data, subscription.

interfaces.name: DestructiveConfirmationSheet
interfaces.signature: struct DestructiveConfirmationSheet: View { let plan: DeletePlan; let onConfirm: () -> Void; let onCancel: () -> Void }
interfaces.notes: Render exact dependent counts before confirm.

interfaces.name: TankSetupCoordinator
interfaces.signature: @MainActor final class TankSetupCoordinator { var tankName: String; var volumeInput: String; var selectedVolumeUnit: VolumeUnit; func canContinue() -> Bool; func saveTank() async throws }
interfaces.notes: Blocking first-run setup with only name and net volume.

interfaces.name: TrendLineChart
interfaces.signature: struct TrendLineChart: View { let points: [WaterTest]; let parameter: WaterParameter }
interfaces.notes: Swift Charts wrapper with reduced-motion fallback.

interfaces.name: ValidationCorrectionBanner
interfaces.signature: struct ValidationCorrectionBanner: View { let message: String; let field: String }
interfaces.notes: Correction-oriented validation messaging.

interfaces.name: PrimaryButton
interfaces.signature: struct PrimaryButton: View { let title: String; let isEnabled: Bool; let action: () -> Void }
interfaces.notes: Consistent 44pt+ hit target button style.
